title: Topology Declarations, Property Equivalence, Policies, and Ownership · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs topology declarations, property equivalence, policies, and ownership from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the versioned topology declaration and ownership manifest. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for versioned topology declaration and ownership manifest after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal d…
objectives: Assign ownership for exchanges, queues, bindings, policies, migrations, rollback, and deletion across application and platform teams.
Make repeated declarations equivalent in type, durability, exclusivity, auto-delete, and immutable arguments and diagnose precondition mismatch.
Choose durable, exclusive server-named, auto-delete, and queue-TTL lifecycles from responsibility and race evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Topology Migration
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 1574 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to protect property equivalence and route mutable operations through policy or versioned migration; bound payload, buffer, and retained-ledger bytes; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Migrate incompatible topology with versioned names, dual bindings, drain evidence, producer and consumer ordering, and rollback.

Inspect the Topology Migration trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Topology Migration.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for migrate incompatible topology with versioned names, dual bindings, drain evidence, producer and consumer ordering, and rollback. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Topology Migration, keep Topology Migration connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
